props.ChoiceText: You were trusted with armor, purse, and private business, and from then on you stood closer to rank than most ever do.
props.ChoiceBio: Being trusted so near your knight let you see how rank works when no one is performing it.

0.TransitionText: Because being trusted so near your knight let you see how rank works when no one is performing it, you remained near power, where service itself became your education.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Squire, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because being trusted so near your knight let you see how rank works when no one is performing it, such visible trust marked you as someone who might rise from service into knighthood.
1.TransitionPrompt: This trust could begin the road to knighthood, but you may remain a squire if you are not ready to take that step.

2.TransitionText: Because being trusted so near your knight let you see how rank works when no one is performing it, you learned to survive by favor, timing, and courtly sense.
2.TransitionPrompt: This proximity to rank could draw you into courtly life, but you may remain a squire if service suits you better.
